title: Wave 29 - Manager provider handoff evidence hardening
description: Coordinate architecture, backend, mobile, and QA work for manager-to-provider handoff evidence parity so assignment success can be confirmed without a second property detail fetch and recovery states remain deterministic.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 29 scope is documented for architect/backend/mobile/qa
Jira epic can be created directly from the task file
Scope aligns with manager-provider handoff evidence parity
